title: Codex Build Instructions

handover.login_method: Enter mktintworks.co@gmail.com and complete the Cloudflare Access email OTP flow.
handover.first_action: Open Products Manager and confirm all 10 products have final images and correct pricing.
handover.second_action: Open Gallery Manager and replace placeholder imagery with real completed jobs.
handover.third_action: Open SEO Manager and review the home page title and description.
handover.fourth_action: Open Blog Editor and prepare the first article about window tinting benefits.
handover.training_note: Use the invoice generator first because it is the main day-to-day operating workflow.

notes: Section 20 does not introduce a new module. It closes the PRD with final compliance, verification, deployment, and handover work.
The direct custom website domain could not be reached from this workspace during verification, so website HTTP checks were completed against the live Pages host instead.
The CMS preview deployment used during verification confirmed the updated dashboard assets and the session-only auth client before this status file was added to the deployed build.
The Worker and CMS deployments for Section 20 were executed from this workspace on April 2, 2026.
